entry.title: Re: Change valuation class for multiple periods/single pe...
entry.content:
Thanks, your answer convinced me that we were on the right path. I found a lower level system that was still in the previous period and made the same changes there. After that moved the period and indeed the last period data is transferred to the new one.

This makes the SAP standard message incorrect, but me very happy since changing the data is now much easier. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Seamless Planning - Beta Program Highlights
entry.content:
Hi @Chris_Kornely 

Although we plan to offer such functionality, we don't yet have a release timeline. One prerequisite that will apply is having the SAC model of the type new/universal model, not the account model. 

Changing the data persistency could be achieved today only through a workaround, which, depending on the use case and landscape, might be doable: backup the model and dependent objects using the content network, delete the content from the SAC tenant, and reimport it from the content network. Upon reimporting, you can choose the data storage as DSP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Quality Management (SAP DQM) and Cloud for Customer (C4C)
entry.content: I eventually got this working, but the C4C documentation is not very clear at all within here....https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/solution-guide-for-sap-service-cloud/9485f5bfefaf432e9ea7ba6029fb6263.html?q=address+validation+communciation+arrangement#loio8e97c7edd636470a8fee5d72fa8bf07d as it says note! dont change these fields but you actually have to change fields in order to get it to work. Now the challenge is how do you get to the mapping config. In here https://help.sap.com/docs/data-quality-services/data-quality-services/create-configuration it tells you how to add config mapping, which is fine. but it talks about the configuration name is passed by the requesting application. In this case C4C and nothing in docs to state where this is passed, it talks about in the JSON message from C4C to DQMm

entry.title: Learn from an SAP Signavio Expert via our live session offering
entry.content:
Did you know you can enhance your SAP Signavio expertise with free live sessions on the SAP Learning Platform? These sessions provide valuable insights into key functionalities and workflows, helping you get the most out of your SAP Signavio solutions.

Simply visit the SAP Learning Platform, select the learning journey of your choice, and scroll down to discover available live sessions. Register for a session and if you are not able to join, you will benefit from a recording that you can watch any time. 

Important Note:
To register, you’ll need an SAP Universal ID. Don’t have one? Visit the SAP Universal ID page to create one quickly and easily.

Check out the following upcoming live sessions I would like to mention here in specific:

Live Session TitleDate More Details
Working in SAP Signavio Process Manager and Collaboration HubDec 2, 2024, 10:00 - 12:00 GMT+1Link
Creating and managing approval workflows with SAP Signavio Process GovernanceDec 4, 2024, 10:00 - 12:00 GMT+1Link
Working in SAP Signavio Process Manager and Collaboration HubJan 23, 2025, 10:00 - 12:00 GMT+1Link
Creating and managing approval workflows with SAP Signavio Process GovernanceJan 30, 2025, 10:00 - 12:00 GMT+1Link

Don’t miss these opportunities to grow your skills and connect with SAP experts. Reserve your spot today and take a step toward mastering SAP Signavio!

entry.title: QM quality notification EWM integration vendor returns
entry.content:
Hi all,
 
As described on SAP help:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/2bc3ee8d1c83404e8cf62418640004f2/15a64024397f4e219c2c800576023304.html?locale=en-US
To enable an EWM transfer posting additionally to the Quality Notification an additional warehouse defect has to be created to enrich the QN with warehouse information.
When the issue is triggered by a warehouse defect this is a acceptable start to perform the steps:
  • Warehouse defect
  • Create QN Q2
  • Assign warehouse defect 
But if the starting point is the Quality Notification (i.e. triggered from a inspection lot defect) the creation of a warehouse defect and transfer via manage defects seems like obsolete steps just to enrich the QN with warehouse information.
Is there a possibility to extent the warehouse information within the QN without 2 additional required apps to perform this task.
 
Kind regards
Michael

entry.title: Re: Managing AI Models with SAP AI Core on BTP: Setup to Deployment Using Docker, GitHub & Objec
entry.content: Is it now supported to use on-premise Docker repo and on-premise GitHub from AI Core via SAP Cloud Connector like it was possible in SAP Data Intelligence ?

entry.title: Re: How to bind selected values from a multi combo box to a variable in SAP Build Apps?
entry.content: Hi, we are using multi combo box quite similarly. But we use appVars due to the fact that the result is needed on a second page. This works of course fine. But when navigating back the selection is gone. Do you have any advice how to show again the selected tokens?

entry.title: how to Change default browser in SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hello community,

I'm trying to add Power BI report inside SAP B1 client using the Browser functionality, but it's not running, just showing the PBI logo, as per the result I reached to, it's because SAP B1 uses Internet Explorer as the default browser,

I tried to change browser default on the Windows server level from IE to Chrome, and it's updated fully, but still getting the same behavior, because SAP still uses IE not Chrome.

If we test the default browser on the server level we can see it's Chrome:

and even from the Default programs we can see it's Chrome as well:

so how we can change SAP B1 browser default?

System Details: 
1. SAP Business One 9.3 PL 10
2. Database: SQL Server 2014
3. Server: Windows Server 2019

Kenan JADDENE

entry.title: Re: How to extract the XML file with data for dunning let...
entry.content:
Hi all,

I tried out in app 'Create Dunning Notice', it worked. Via menu->Output you can navigate to the output, then create a new output item via 'Add Output' (with adding a new item via 'Duplicate' it does NOT work), enter missing field values like in completed item, enter #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&# as Print Queue Name, then press 'Display Document'.
Best regards, Gabi

entry.title: Please, I need to convert these loops to the new version 7.5 syntax
entry.content:
LOOP AT t_bseg ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_bseg>) where hkont = <fs_cuentas>-saknr.
          LOOP AT t_grupo2 INTO DATA(wa_grupo2) WHERE bukrs = p_bukrs AND gjahr = p_ejer AND belnr = <fs_bseg>-belnr AND buzei = <fs_bseg>-buzei.
            lv_monto_gp2 = lv_monto_gp2 + wa_grupo2-bwshb.
          ENDLOOP.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Personas , script OnEnter with unwanted "enter" f...

Hello Cristin,

Finally I didn't managed to adjust my script.

So I created new fields for the material and quantity and copy these values to the standard field when the user is ok.

Thanks anyway.

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting Process in Extended Warehouse Management

entry.title: How to enable the create button in the Flexible Programming Model?
entry.content:
Hi, everybody.

I have a problem with my custom page. I can currently see what I want but the create button is only visible when I enter edit mode. How do I make the button visible without having to edit some record?

I am using a service made in CAP and I have draft enabled.

Edit mode

Reading mode

entry.title: Re: Understanding the rollup hierarchy method of planning
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec 

Just a clarification . 

Client need everyone in one sheet. So if I am using Rollup Hierarchy, I will make CEO as the planner and then launch the worksheet. So everyone comes in that sheet except CEO. As CEO is missing i will go to Add Employee and then add CEO also in the same worksheet. In system I am able to do this . But do you think it will create any problem?

Thanks, 

PP

entry.title: MODELO DE AUTORIZACIÓN DOCUMENTO VENCIDO
entry.content:
Buenas tardes para todos he intentado realizar un query para un modelo de autorización el cual cada vez que un cliente tenga una factura vencida se active el modelo de autorización para que sea aprobado.

Actualmente cuento con el siguiente Query pero no me aparece la ventana para enviar al aprobador "Por favor pueden ayudarme a validar que me hace falta para que funcione correctamente ? 

SELECT DISTINCT
'TRUE'
FROM
OCRD T1
INNER JOIN
OINV T2 ON T1."CardCode" = T2."CardCode"
WHERE
T1."CardCode" = $[ORDR.CardCode]
AND T2."DocStatus" = 'O'
AND T2."DocDueDate" < GETDATE()



 

Muchas gracias quedare muy atento.

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content: Thank you @Volker_Ruof . Can you please share the link? I cannot see it in the SAP deep links documentation Deep Links in Employee Central | SAP Help Portal, nor the feature documentation. Thank you very much.

entry.title: Post request to /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product is returning XML instead of JSON
entry.content:
Hi community!

I'm using the API /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product to create products via Http call. According to the API documentation (https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_PRODUCT_SRV_0001/path/post_A_Product), the content of the response should be a JSON object in both success and error case scenarios, but I'm getting an XML response content.

I'm sending a JSON object in my request body and setting the content type header as "application/json". I have been able to successfully create products by sending POST requests to this end-point but I'm still receiving an XML object in the response content.

If I add the query parameter "$format=json" to my request URL, I get a Bad Request response saying that my request contains invalid parameters, but this time the response content is a JSON object.

What should I do in order to get a JSON response as described in the documentation.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAC script to obtain Story Folder
entry.content:
Hi experts, here is a technical goal. 

In the SAC optimised story I would like a text box to be made visible only when the stories save folder path meets a certain criteria. 

ie

If the current Story path contains "Pathx" then Text box = visible 

It is so that we can make a clear visible distinction when people open stories saved in the 'centrally approved' folder where stories are validated and those homebrew stories that are being run from users own folders. 

I have tried to look if there is some script where I can obtain the story path, but cant find it. 

 

Any ideas?

Thanks all

entry.title: SAP Personas, store a sound as resource.
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to play a specific sound on user error.

I found a way to store it on Jukehost (https://gist.github.com/Moutard3/b925b090ab1d6d20a5d20f054bae7bca#opendrive), it's working but sometimes it takes some time to play it.

Is there a way to store it as resource in the SAP server and play it?

I tried but couldn't achieve it.

Thanks,

Emmanuel.

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Service with Advanced Execution in SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Ramesh

Thanks for a useful blog. We are busy implementing S4H Service (Private cloud) and will definately be using the advanced execution model. I am unclear as to whether we should use the Legacy Organizational Management model or the Enterprise Organization model.  From the description in the doco I tend more towards using EOM, but In the Learning path (Configuring SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition for Service) they say Legacy Org model is a "pre-requisite" and that it is not recommended to use EOM with advanced exeuction. 

Is this correct? I understand that with EOM the automatic determination of planning plant and work center is not possible - that is a definitate negative. Is this the reason and is there no way to do so like BADI?

Could you shed some light on that?


Thanks

Patrick

entry.title: Re: Missing F110 Payments in BNK_MONI
entry.content: Mahira: Thanks for the information, I was able to create batch. However one last issue is that Batch is in the approved status. I have configured WF and it did not get triggered to send email for approval. Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: The XML-message Payloads - in which table are they st...
entry.content: /IWFND/SU_TPLOAD Table contains the XML Request

entry.title: Re: Missing F110 Payments in BNK_MONI
entry.content: here is the message Rules for Approval in the Rule Description

entry.title: Re: Please, I need to convert these loops to the new version 7.5 syntax
entry.content: Why do you need to change it? New code or old code? The current code is easy to understand, 7.40 will not improve anything (not performance if it's the goal of changing it). You just take the risk to add a bug. Of course, it's unclear why one loop is with "field symbol" and one is with "data".

entry.title: Re: Please, I need to convert these loops to the new version 7.5 syntax
entry.content:
Hello, yes it is indeed to check if it runs faster since it is a table that contains a lot of data and is taking at least 4 minutes to run. As for the work area, I replaced it with a field-symbol
        LOOP AT t_bseg ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_bseg>) where hkont = <fs_cuentas>-saknr.
          LOOP AT t_grupo2 ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_grupo2>) WHERE bukrs = p_bukrs AND gjahr = p_ejer AND belnr = <fs_bseg>-belnr AND buzei = <fs_bseg>-buzei.
            lv_monto_gp2 = lv_monto_gp2 + <fs_grupo2>-bwshb.
          ENDLOOP.
        ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: TM in SAP S/4HANA 2023: Build Freight Units always for all complete Sales Order items
entry.content: What is the setting in LIP (logistics integration profile), which allows to switch between old and new behavior ?

entry.title: ILM - COPA2 - Archiving the COKA table
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using the RK4DA000 program for archiving the COBK, COEP, COSP and COSS tables through the COPA2-XXXX object. This part is okay and the related tables are correctly processed.

To process the COKA table, it is required to ticked a check-box. This checkblox allows to process items of this table.

The configuration added in IRM_CUST_BS and the configuration done through IRMPOL work as expected for processing the COBK, COEP, COSP and COSS tables. This part is fine.

The issue comes when the checkbox for arching the COKA table is ticked. At that time, SAP returns one error message to say that no rule is found (LRM_RULE_EXEC 310). 

I tried several configurations in IRM_CUST_BS and IRMPOL for that COKA table without finding the good one. The same error message is always returned (LRM_RULE_EXEC 310). 

Can you please suggest ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Job Scheduling Service - Consume Secured CAP Service
entry.content: Hi have anyone been able to solve this issue ?? I´m facing exactly the same problem.

entry.title: Re: Change a dataset in a SAC story and to keep the story...
entry.content:
hi, 

thx.

Can up please send me screenshots to this procdure belwo, bcs i can't see the step 

"Select Get data from a data source"

Procedure

  1. From the Main Menu, select Create > Model.
  2. Select Get data from a data source.
  3. From the proposed list, select Dataset and browse up to your dataset.

entry.title: Re: Implicit enhancement is permitted in SAP certified product or not?.
entry.content:
I believe that by "SAP-certified products" you mean only ABAP-based on-prem SAP products.

In my entire consulting career, I only once worked on a project, literally 20 years ago, where a huge customer had something like 7 custom code edits in SAP ERP directly in the standard ABAP code. It was a big deal during the migration project from R/3 to ECC to make sure they did not break new functionality and worked properly after the upgrade.

I never faced such a customer again after that, so I cannot give any expert advice, but I believe the help page you are looking for is: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/dfb02462c453431eaf249aad96f004f8/92747bc19f1844f3a9ef37736076318f.html

The modern approach to extensions is obviously the Clean Core: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-extensions-and-clean-core-with-sap-btp-a-best-practices/ba-p/13567239

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management - OAuth 2.0 authentication with Su...
entry.content:
Hi @vinayak_adkoli ,

Thank you for your response. Much appreciated!
As I mentioned, I replaced /oauth/idp with /oauth/token as highlighted in this post. 

Since with policy template described in the old blog, the SAML assertion is being generated within SAP APIM, isn't SAP APIM itself acting as a Idp in this case.

Also, how is the new approach using Microsoft Entra ID in blog shared by @Martin-Pankraz better than the existing one everything is handled inside SAP APIM. Thanks again!

entry.title: Re: Managing AI Models with SAP AI Core on BTP: Setup to Deployment Using Docker, GitHub & Objec
entry.content:
Hi Cocquerel,

As of my current knowledge, SAP AI Core does not support accessing on-premise Docker registries or on-premise GitHub repositories via SAP Cloud Connector. SAP AI Core is designed to integrate with cloud-based services, and its architecture does not facilitate direct connections to on-premise systems through the Cloud Connector.

In contrast, SAP Data Intelligence offers more flexibility in connecting to on-premise resources, including Docker registries and Git repositories, through the Cloud Connector. This capability allows SAP Data Intelligence to interact with on-premise systems more seamlessly.

For SAP AI Core, it's recommended to use cloud-based Docker registries and Git repositories to ensure smooth integration and operation. If your workflows require access to on-premise resources, you might need to consider alternative approaches or tools that support such configurations.

Regards,

Abhijeet

entry.title: Re: I have created a sales order but TM Status Tab is not enabled
entry.content: I maintained LIP and TM Relevancy settings, it works fine by showing up TM Status tab, but now my problem is, TM Status doesn't show on the Sales Orders which were created earlier ? What shall I do ?

entry.title: Re: How to Read Data Stored in SAP Datasphere from SAP BW Bridge
entry.content:
Hello @andrea_beschi,

Yes, that's the item on the roadmap. This blog will be referenced in the roadmap item shortly.

Regards,
Dominik

entry.title: Re: Please, I need to convert these loops to the new version 7.5 syntax
entry.content:
Okay. So, you need to create one index on BSEG-T_HKONT, and one index on T_GRUPO2-BUKRS + GJAHR + BELNR + BUZEI. If you are not confident with the impacts, the easiest solution is to add a secondary sorted index with a non-unique key e.g.

DATA t_bseg TYPE ...
  WITH NON-UNIQUE SORTED KEY by_hkont COMPONENTS hkont.

DATA t_grupo2 TYPE ...
  WITH NON-UNIQUE SORTED KEY by_bseg_key COMPONENTS bukrs gjahr belnr buzei.

LOOP AT t_bseg ... USING KEY by_hkont WHERE hkont = ...
  LOOP AT t_grupo2 ... USING KEY by_bseg_key WHERE bukrs = ...

Of course, you may also write it with REDUCE, but the performance issue can ONLY be solved with the indexes.

entry.title: Re: How to get item descriptions with line breaks into a...
entry.content:
Dear All,

I think I can offer the solution now.

"pa_cpnt.cpnt_desc" returns the ID of the description.

The locale value of this ID is stored in table "PA_I18N_LOCALIZED_LABEL". It can be retrieved like this:

------------------------------------------

SELECT DISTINCT 
-- the following looks for the english localization of the description
LocDescEn.label_value
 
FROM 
pa_cpnt pv
    LEFT OUTER JOIN PA_I18N_LOCALIZED_LABEL LocDescEn
       ON LocDescEn.LABEL_ID = pv.CPNT_DESC AND LocDescEn.LOCALE_ID = 'English' 
--------------------------
 
Once the localized value is retrieved, it can be easily cleaned with sql:
-- the following looks for a cleaned version of english localization of the description
REPLACE(REPLACE(LocDescEn.label_value, CHAR(10), ''), CHAR(13), '')
 
While this works fine with the item description, I did not manage the same for the "Target Audience" yet. The "Target Audience" can also include line breaks. I tried to retrieve it with the same logic as the description, but so far I failed.
 
Maybe you have an idea?

entry.title: Re: HTML5 App published but not showing in Work Zone Cont...

entry.title: SAP IBP - No pop-up to enter reason code and comment despite Global Parameter ENFORCE_REASON_CODE

Dear experts,

After turning on the Global Parameter ENFORCE_REASON_CODE by Value: YES:

You still experience the Reason Codes & Comments not being shown when trying to save data into an Editable Key Figure, contrary to expectation.

Kind regards,

Vincent Verheyen

entry.title: Re: Prov. contract "transactional_interface" must not be used.
entry.content: Hi, were you able to find a solution to your problem? I'm having the same error

entry.title: Re: TM Status is not coming while creating sales order
entry.content:
This was answered many times, but here it is again:

  1. If it is embedded TM , then you must maintain LIP (Logistics Integration Profile) with "Automatic Freight Unit Building " flag enabled.
    •  
       

       

  2.  Maintain Transportation Relevancy of Sales Document ( Sales Org, Distribution Channel, Division, Sales Order Type) with the correct control key.

    •

entry.title: Re: Handle domain-driven authorization in a Node.js CAP a...
entry.content:
I managed to do it, I had to fiddle with cds types a little.

Anyways, is handling authorizations in the custom handlers the only way to bypass the associations navigation limit?

Thanks,
Federico

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP - No pop-up to enter reason code and comment...
entry.content:
Hi self,

ENFORCE_REASON_CODE enforces the user to enter a reason code and/or comment when Saving Data. However, a prerequisite is that the SUPPRESS_RC_COMMENT is not set to X. 


Ensure that the SUPPRESS_RC_COMMENT is left blank, not X:



SUPPRESS_RC_COMMENT set to blank will enable the pop-up dialog to enter reason codes and/or comments. If left blank, then ENFORCE_REASON_CODE can make it obligatory for the user to enter those.

Kind regards,

Vincent Verheyen

entry.title: Re: SAP BW Bridge: Just a SAP BW/4HANA in SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
It is now possible to use SAP Datasphere as a source for the SAP BW Bridge. More information is available here:

How to Read Data Stored in SAP Datasphere from SAP BW Bridge

entry.title: Re: How to post code in SAP Community >=2024
entry.content: The bug with the space around the code sample blocks has not been forgotten. We have been working with our vendor to fix the issue.

entry.title: Getting Timeout Error when adding a S4 HANA system in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have downloaded Eclipse for IDE fromEclipse.org. We have an existing S4 HANA system with below installed Product versions (screenshot below). When I try to add this SAP system into Eclipse under ABAP Perspective. It just timeout. Attached below is the Eclipse Trace log

LOCATION SAP-Gateway on host 
sapgw01
ERROR timeout during allocate
TIME Wed Nov 20 15:40:27 2024
RELEASE 789
COMPONENT SAP-Gateway
VERSION 2
RC 242
MODULE /bas/789_REL/src/krn/si/gw/gwr3cpic.c
LINE 2264
DETAIL no connect of TP sapdp01 from host 10.53.252.5 after 20 sec
COUNTER 2
(remote system is [<unknown>])
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.AbstractConnection.generateJCoException(AbstractConnection.java:623)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ClientConnection.connectInternal(ClientConnection.java:626)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ClientConnection.connect(ClientConnection.java:1202)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.RepositoryConnection.connect(RepositoryConnection.java:190)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.PoolingFactory.init(PoolingFactory.java:116)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ConnectionManager.createFactory(ConnectionManager.java:527)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.DefaultConnectionManager.createFactory(DefaultConnectionManager.java:31)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.ConnectionManager.getFactory(ConnectionManager.java:469)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.RfcDestination.getSystemID(RfcDestination.java:1697)
... 35 more
Caused by: RfcException raised by system [<unknown>]:
message: Connect from SAP gateway to RFC server failed
connection parameters: TYPE=A DESTINATION=S4D_100_ecosys3_en ASHOST=10.53.252.5 SYSNR=01 PCS=1

SAP Experts can you please help. We need to add this system for developing CDS views
BW SAP HANA Modeling Tools (Eclipse) ABAP Development  #Eclipse

entry.title: Basic Authentication not working in BAS or CICD
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following the following tutorial with the Trial BTP Account:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/set-up-cicd.html

It asks in here to create credentials for Cloud Foundry. However, on the trial account, the credentials I use to log into BTP account do not work even with BAS, from where I have published the app being used in here. The credentials do not work on using them in Continuous Integration and Delivery either, as expected.

 

On BAS, I am only able to log into Cloud Foundry using SSO Temporary Authentication Code, but from the given authentication options, I am not sure how to log into CF. 

Could someone please help?

Thanks

entry.title: W2 Box 14 reporting wrong amount for field TALO EX OT WAGES
entry.content:
When we run W2’s we found that W2 Box 14 is reporting the wrong amount for field TALO EX OT WAGES for non-Alabama employees that has overtime wages but doesn’t have wage type /PPE.

However, this is working as expected for AL employees that has OT and wage type /PPE in the results table.

entry.title: Re: Joule - Unified Setup: Bridging Simplicity and Performance
entry.content:
Hi @jasbirkhanuja2, 

Thanks for the question. Yes, we plan to support the delivery of Joule extension scenarios with SAP Build and introduce the Analytical capability by Q1 2025.

Regards,

Nagesh

entry.title: Add Custom Field to Fiori Application
entry.content:
General Information

App name: Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document

App ID: F0843

System: SAP S/4HANA (Private Cloud and On-Premise)

Version: 2021 FPS02

The app is based on the OData service MMIM_GR4PO_DL.

 

Description of issue

I want to add a field where the Supplier Material is displayed within the Items section, as the arrow in the image indicates. It is from the entity set “GR4PO_DL_Item”, marked in one of the screenshot from SEGW  and it is not from the CDS view.

What I have tried

  1. I started by looking into the issue with Adapt UI to try to add the field that way. However, this did not work because the field does not exist.
  2. I tried using Custom Fields. There, we used the business contexts PO Item and Material Document Item. That did not work either.

Is there any way we could introduce the new field “Supplier Material” in the items section of the above app?

entry.title: Re: eDelivery Cancellation Turkey - Status

entry.title: Re: EHS_FTAPPL_2 how to handle more than one path?
entry.content: how did you solve this issue? We are facing same issue now after implementing support packages.

entry.title: Re: Understanding the rollup hierarchy method of planning
entry.content:
Hi @prashantpriya8 

Do NOT have everyone in one worksheet, you will have serious performance issues when saving updated entries in Executive Review or in the worksheet. It's in the blog above:

 

Launch a worksheet for each planner, have they all route to Comp Admin one and only step, then give Executive Review access to whoever needs to have it. You can also remove the CEO as an approver for specific worksheets once they are created so that CEO doesn't receive many worksheets in their inbox.

 

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: SAP IBP Excel Add-in: How to Dynamically Update changedItems in IBPMDBeforeUpdate Hook?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am developing a custom SAP Integrated Business Planning for demand  Excel Add-in for Master Data and have implemented the hook methods IBPMDAfterRefresh and IBPMDBeforeUpdate to handle custom calculations and logic. While I’ve successfully incorporated the functionality to calculate values based on data within the Excel sheet, I am facing a challenge with the save process.

Scenario:

  1. What I’ve Achieved:
    • The IBPMDBeforeUpdate hook is successfully triggered when a user modifies data in the Excel workbook.
    • I have implemented calculations within this hook method, which dynamically update the Excel data based on specific conditions.
  2. The Problem:
    • The changedItems parameter in the IBPMDBeforeUpdate method contains only the rows explicitly modified by the user.
    • Since IBP uses this changedItems array to determine which rows to save back, the calculated rows (updated programmatically) are not included in the save process.
    • As a result, the calculated values appear updated in Excel but are not saved to IBP.

Example Use Case:

  • Issue:
    • Only the rows explicitly edited by the user (part of changedItems) are saved to IBP.
    • Rows updated programmatically during the calculation logic are not part of changedItems, so they are not saved, so we need to click on save again to update the programmatically updated values back to IBP.

Key Questions:

  1. How can I programmatically update the changedItems parameter in the IBPMDBeforeUpdate hook to include the rows updated through calculations?
  2. Is there a recommended approach to ensure that all programmatically updated rows are saved back to IBP along with user-modified rows on a single save?

Technical Context:

  • The project involves a custom SAP IBP Excel Add-in where hook methods (IBPMDAfterRefresh and IBPMDBeforeUpdate) are implemented to handle custom calculations and save logic.
  • The changedItems parameter is currently the bottleneck, as it restricts the save process to only manually edited rows.

Closing:

If anyone has encountered a similar challenge or knows how to programmatically update the changedItems array, I’d greatly appreciate your guidance! Any examples, best practices, or alternative approaches would be immensely helpful.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Prabhu M

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow Purchase requisition my inbox - approve error

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - GR Based IV indicator Check
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement where the intercompany stock transfer happens from US to UK or France and they don't need to have invoice for that.

Is it possible to create a 0 dollar purchase order in SAP S/4 public cloud. I tried by creating a NBIC PO with marking that line item free but it still throwing an error that GR and IR indicators are necessary. GR Based IV indicator is greyed out and I couldn't do any manual control over that. I checked in Vendor master and it's unticked on that and also there is no PIR maintained for that product. I believe it's a system default setting. Would someone can throw some lights on the above would be great.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Understanding the rollup hierarchy method of planning
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec 

In our worksheet we dont have to update any columns . its all calculated columns so once worksheet is launched the final amount will get auto calculated. 

Worksheet is not going to CEO for any approval. We are making him planner in roll up hierarchy just to launch the worksheet. Worksheet will go to CompAdmin as 1st step in route map and then compAdmin will move it to final step. 

The query is that if we are making CEO as Planner in Rollup Hierarchy then he is getting skipped in worksheet . So I am adding him again in same worksheet manually, so that everyone will be in same worksheet. Is adding planner in worksheet will create any issue?

 

Thanks, 

Prashant

entry.title: Re: Bidirectional data replication with SDI
entry.content:
Hi Helen,

we want to replicate the same table between both systems.

entry.title: SAP Bill Of Material purpose
entry.content:
Hello All,

During a recent discussion between two SAP enthusiasts—one being myself from the data domain and the other a mechanical engineer who has just stepped into / started his SAP journey—it became evident how valuable real-time examples are for understanding concepts.

To bridge the gap and make the discussion more relatable, I shared a practical example, connecting all the dots to explain the concept effectively.

Using relatable examples not only clarifies complex SAP topics but also ensures a better understanding, regardless of one’s background. It’s always rewarding to share knowledge and help others grow in their SAP journey.

Understanding SAP BOM with a Simple Example

A Bill of Materials (BOM) in SAP is like a recipe for making a product. It tells you what components (ingredients) are needed and in what quantities to create the final product (finished good).

Example: Making a Wooden Chair

 

Finished Product: Wooden Chair
Components Required:

  1. Wooden Plank (4 pieces)
  2. Nails (12 pieces)
  3. Wood Glue (1 tube)
  4. Varnish (0.5 liters)

How It Works in SAP

  1. Parent Material: The Wooden Chair is the parent material (finished product) in the BOM. It is the item being produced.

    • Material Code: CHAIR001

  2. Child Components: The components (raw materials) needed to assemble the chair are the child materials in the BOM.

    • Material Codes:
      • WOODPLANK001 for Wooden Plank
      • NAILS001 for Nails
      • WOODGLUE001 for Wood Glue
      • VARNISH001 for Varnish

  3. Quantities: The BOM specifies the exact quantities of each child material needed to produce one Wooden Chair:

    • Wooden Plank: 4 pieces
    • Nails: 12 pieces
    • Wood Glue: 1 tube
    • Varnish: 0.5 liters

  4. BOM Structure in SAP:
    In SAP, the BOM structure might look like this:

Material Description Quantity Unit

CHAIR001Wooden Chair1Each
WOODPLANK001Wooden Plank4Pieces
NAILS001Nails12Pieces
WOODGLUE001Wood Glue1Tube
VARNISH001Varnish0.5Liters

How SAP BOM is Used in Business Processes

  1. Production Planning:

    • When a production order is created for 10 Wooden Chairs, SAP calculates the required materials based on the BOM:
      • 40 Wooden Planks
      • 120 Nails
      • 10 Tubes of Wood Glue
      • 5 Liters of Varnish

  2. Material Requirements Planning (MRP):

    • SAP checks inventory levels for the components. If any materials are below required levels, purchase requisitions or production orders are created automatically.

  3. Costing:

    • SAP uses the BOM to calculate the cost of producing one Wooden Chair by summing up the costs of the components.

  4. Inventory Management:

    • When the chair is manufactured, SAP reduces the stock of Wooden Planks, Nails, Wood Glue, and Varnish and increases the stock of Wooden Chairs.

Conclusion

In this example, the BOM for a Wooden Chair acts as the foundation for manufacturing, planning, and costing. It ensures that production processes run smoothly by detailing the components required to create the product.

entry.title: Re: "Creation Failed" error during ABAP TRIAL Booster exe...
entry.content: Did you can solve the problem?

entry.title: Re: Error activating Business Content Sales Analysis in S...
entry.content:
Hello,

Although SAP advised me to download the latest version, I was unable to fully download the content. I had two tenants—DEV and PRD. When I downloaded the content in DEV, all objects were visible. However, in PRD, not all objects were successfully downloaded.

To resolve this, I downloaded the content, manually transported the missing objects and models, and then downloaded the tables. This approach worked well for both tenants.

I hope this information is helpful.

entry.title: I want to get Lead Contacts from Sales Cloud V1 to Emarsys
entry.content:
How can I get lead contacts into Emarsys?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: I want to get Lead Contacts from Sales Cloud V1 to Em...
entry.content:
In order to get leads from Emarsys to Sales Cloud and the other way around, you must have the Account Engagement correctly configured. According to the SAP Emarsys Help document below, you should be able to sync the leads:

  • Matching | SAP Help Portal
  • Replicate New Marketing Contact | SAP Help Portal

 

Please make sure that everything is set up as explained at the following SAP Help document: Managing Data Integration | SAP Help Portal. This will ensure that a smooth integration will be in place.

entry.title: Digital Signature Implementation
entry.content:
Hi,

We are having a scenario where we need to implement Digital Signature Where when user clicks on authenticate or Sign the the user BTP Credentials should be validated . Is there any standard approach for this or documentation. can you please help.

The current product involves Fiori applications built on BTP ABAP using BTP RAP SERVICES.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Digital Signature Implementation
entry.content:
There is no standard process for this. It might be achieved through custom development. For assistance with this you can reach out to SAP Consulting or continue here on the SAP Community for assistance from other community members.

Thanks,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Error activating Business Content Sales Analysis in S...
entry.content: Thanks ElsaZam for sharing this information and good to understand that you solved the issue on your PRD instance helping yourself. We have also just released the version 1.3.0 of this package. If doable please try to install this one and let us know if this version may fix the issue you observed in your PRD instance. If it still fails with 1.3.0, could you please share the error raised in PRD with us sending a mail with the screenshot and details to content.sapdatasphere@sap.com for furher analysis?

do you know how to enhance ALV list on this screen (transaction /SCWM/TODLV_O):

I see that ALV is managed by class /SCMB/CL_BASE:

4) Location : Jeddah, Saudi Arabia

5) Salary Range: between USD 50K to USD 60K per year

entry.title: Error 'Copying control is missing for DL NL' in cloud
entry.content:
when creating an outbound delivery for an STO the system is raising this error: 
'Copying control is missing for: DL NL'


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error 'Copying control is missing for DL NL' in cloud
entry.content:
This configuration is delivered as standard content with the scope item BME. 
Scope item BME (Stock Transfer with Delivery) is a non standard scope item which will only be activated upon request.
Activate scope item BME to resolve this issue. 
Please refer to this SAP KBA for further details https://me.sap.com/notes/2767287

entry.title: Update Parent fields depending on child fields forma MDF Object
entry.content:
Good afternoon!

We have two MDF objects with a Parent-Child relation. We need to modify a field of the parent object depending on the values ​​assigned in the child object at the time of saving the data.

However, when generating a rule with a base object “MDF Child” we cannot see the fields of the parent in the then clause.

If we generate a rule with a base object “MDF Parent” it is not executed at the time of saving if the fields of the parent object are not modified.

Is there a way to carry out this process through rules?

Can the permission to edit the parameters be assigned as with the Basic rules?

entry.title: Re: How to report issue on UI5 control
entry.content: Can I get some more details on creating SAP UI5 Control ticket?

entry.title: SAP Intelligent Agriculture – Farming Recommendations
entry.content:
How to improve farming decision support via recommendations

In the age of digitalized farming machinery, farming robots and artificial intelligence, companies in the agribusiness industry are collecting more and more data along the farming production process directly from fields and farms. On the other hand, they often lack standard solutions to efficiently use that data to optimize farming processes or provide better farming services.

With SAP Intelligent Agriculture customers have an enterprise grade tool at hand to streamline and standardize that data.

A new functionality called “Recommendations”, which was released recently provides a framework that helps end-users to create recommendations in SAP Intelligent Agriculture based on their assessment of the situation on the farm. These recommendations are aimed at the farm manager responsible for a farm, who can review and accept, alter or even reject the farming recommendations. In case of a rejection, the provider of the recommendation would receive a note from the farm manager containing the reason why the recommendation wasn’t accepted. Accepted recommendations will automatically turn into scheduled tasks that can be transferred to resources for execution.

Combined with the historic farm data that companies can store in SAP Intelligent Agriculture, Recommendations provide a fundamental feature for standardization and optimization of crop growing patterns.

With that SAP Intelligent Agriculture is now providing the next step towards a full end-to-end digital decision support process for agribusiness enterprises and opens up additional usage scenarios for farming service providers.

This functionality is available via API and UI for the maximum convenience level of our customers.

 

Figure 1: Screenshot of Recommendations

Recommendations can be used manyfold

SAP Intelligent Agriculture is an open platform that allows to use the functionality for enterprise farming companies that are growing their own crops as a direct decision support for their farmers within the growing season. Companies that are working together with contracted farmers in a consortium or as a consumer goods producer can leverage that functionality to support the contracted farmers with decision support on farming activities.

Companies that are providing farming services as a business model, consulting and executing farming tasks on behalf of their clients will also benefit from that functionality. Based on data collected on the operations of the fields and farms, those companies are now equipped to plan, create and maintain recommendations that can be handed over to farmers.

Agribusiness companies are working together with a variety of external service providers offering farming decision support solutions. The new functionality also helps to integrate those providers in a standardized way. A provider for intelligent fungicide management for example is now able to integrate recommendations about when, where and how to spray fungicide in an optimal way. These recommendations, once approved by the farmer, can be automatically transferred to the plan as farming tasks.

How to create a recommendation in the APP?

Let’s get our hands dirty and create a recommendation in the system. In our scenario, Katharina Agronomist, working for a consortium of farms, wants to assist the farm managers in optimizing their yield for the running growing season. Katharina was monitoring the soil conditions and the predicted yield for fields of the grain farm in the last couple of weeks and analyzed that it is necessary to schedule a fertilization program. She logs into SAP Intelligent Agriculture and starts creating a recommendation for the fields of the grain farm.

Step 1: Katharina logs into her SAP Intelligent Agriculture tenant as Agronomist and searches for the app tile with the title “Recommendations”. Once she found the tile, she clicks on it to enter.

 Figure 2: Recommendations App on Launchpad

Step 2: She sees a list of recommendations. Also, a button to create a new one. She clicks that button.
Hint: Alternatively, Katharina can access a recommendation from the list and use the “copy” function to create a deep copy of an existing recommendation. This is helpful to provide multiple recommendations at once.

 Figure 3: Recommendations - Overview

Step 3: A new screen will open, and a new recommendation object is created in draft mode.

Figure 4: New Recommendation - Entry Screen

Step 4: Katharina enters all the necessary information.

She starts with the name of the recommendation, adds the farm, the date or period the recommendation is valid for. and clicks on “add recommended task”. Then she adds name, task type and task priority. In our case, she is also entering the field, the task is valid for and specifies the resources and recommended materials for the fertilization. After that, she confirms by clicking “apply”. With that, the newly created, recommended Task is added to the list of recommended tasks.

 Figure 5: New Recommendation - Recommended Task

Step 5: The next step for Katharina is to finalize her recommendation by clicking “create”.

Figure 6: New Recommendation - Create

This will create the recommendation and afterwards switches the focus to an overview screen that is shown to the farm manager the recommendation is addressed to. He can decide to edit, approve, or reject it.

Approving the recommendation will create a fertilization task in SAP Intelligent Agriculture’s task management that can be viewed in the task scheduling or task list app.

Rejecting requires a reason that can be accessed and reviewed by the agronomist.

Figure 7: Recommendation - Farm Manager View

Benefits of Farming Recommendations in a nutshell

  • Create personalized recommendations that help optimize farming processes and maximize field output
  • Easily evaluate recommendations and approve, reject, or modify the recommended tasks
  • Integrate recommendations from external systems through APIs

What is SAP Intelligent Agriculture all about?

SAP Intelligent Agriculture can help agribusinesses that run their own farm operations to increase their profitability per farmed area and support their efforts towards achieving sustainable farming practices. Also, the solution can be used to enable data-driven farming services and products that are marketed to farming business partners which generate new business and increase adoption and retention of new farmer collaboration channels.

Both are key priorities for Agribusinesses around the globe. Profitability in many farming operations is a key challenge and optimizing yields, quality of crop produces as well as optimizing use of crop inputs such as fertilizer, crop protection can have large effects. Many factors come into play on how to achieve this and farming operations differ significantly across the globe: different farm sizes, farming practices, different crops, level of mechanization and standardization etc. Still across all these differences we hear consensus that yields, and cost need to be improved by leveraging new types of relevant data.

Visit the SAP Intelligent Agriculture | Intelligent Agriculture landing page

What’s Next?

This is just the start.  As part of the vision of Intelligent Agriculture, it is planned to support integrations with third party service providers in a convenient way via configuration for recommendations. This will allow end-users to build-up a catalogue of important services, including AI-based ones, that optimize the crop growing cycle by giving farming recommendations just-in-time, specific for crop, variety, season and a

Visit SAP’s Roadmap Explorer to keep up to date on the latest and planned innovations.

Learn more… 

  • Recommendation App | SAP Help Portal 
  • Recommendation API & Service | SAP API Guide and SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: Re: SAP Code-Jam Request in Dubai
entry.content:
Really glad to see that finally the SAP community is now growing in Middle East region as well.

Keep it up!

entry.title: Re: Defining a threshold for Other in Donut Chart (Fiori Elements)
entry.content:
No, this suggested answer of kchatch1 is not true...
Fiori is doing this automatically if you configure it correctly. With responsive cards it also depends on the size of the card.
You have to have to implement the donut chart like this with Dimension as #CATEGORY + you need a presentation variant:

The only strange thing is that the value you give does not fit to the count which is displayed. When I put 1, it displays 2 + Others. When i put 3 it displays 4 + Others. Maybe this is because of the responsivness of the cards. But besides this it works fine.
PS: Don't forget to include the Presentation Variant into your manifest.json

BR Tobi

entry.title: Re: How to create a .tif image file and download in syste...
entry.content: I expect you will need an external tool.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
The solution is to apply the note, I can't send the solution.

In case the note can not be applied short term, the ABAP workbench can be switched to use the TextEdit control instead. To activate the fallback, in transactions like se80, se38 etc. choose the menu "Utilities" > "Settings". On tab "ABAP Editor", inner-tab "Editor", activate the "Text-based editor" radiobutton and restart the transaction to take effect.

entry.title: Re: GRC BRM issue with tcodes been erased from the menu
entry.content:
Hi, 

having the same issue, did you find the answer?

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP - Adjusted key figure calculation definition...
entry.content:
Hi @Daniele_Cuozzo ,

The reason is because your Key Figure ZZADJTEST in its @Request level calculation does not reference its Calculated Value, instead it references its Stored Value (see the cube icon 🧊) in your screenshot of ZZADJTEST. 

This is different in the your Key Figure ZZTESTACTQTY2:where the @Request level calculation does reference the Calculated Value instead of the Stored Value.

Solution: please edit Key Figure ZZADJTEST in its @Request level calculation by clicking on 'Edit' next to REQUEST, and subsequently click on 'Inputs' and subsequently select 'Calculated' instead of 'Stored' next to ZZADJTEST@ZZMTHPRODLOCCUST2 .

Please let me know if there is anything which remains unclear. If not, you may mark this as a correct answer.

Kind regards,

Vincent Verheyen

entry.title: Re: How to create a .tif image file and download in syste...
entry.content: To "SAPSCRIPT_CONVERT_BITMAP seems to allow a BMP to ITF conversion?": ITF is not TIFF. ITF is a SAP internal format: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/872c7db8e8ad411c8c3364aceed6e2c1/4e16819fb84a1a27e10000000a42189e.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Demystifying Document Management Service on BTP
entry.content:
Hi Sudeep1,

Thanks for the blog it is so useful.

My requirement is to create an API in CAPM that reads the file from repository of DMS from BTP and read the data in the file and save in the staging tables. Please let me know if this is feasible.

Thanks,

Mamatha

entry.title: Re: EWM: customer fields in ALV list "Stk Can Be Removed"...
entry.content:
I did some debugging and I share my solution. I hope I will help somenone in the future.

As I wrote before, ALV lists are managed by class /SCMB/CL_BASE.

At the beginning the method CREATE_ALV is called where field catalogue is build. Here we can find the structure name where we need to add customer fields:

We can add customer fields to this structure using append structure:

In next step, we must fill this field with data. We do this in method CONVERT_DATA_FOR_ALV. I created an implicit enhancement:

The method is universal and it works on generic types therefore I needed to create my own structures and use MOVE-CORRESPONDING to transfer data from and to generic variables. We must check the structure name which is in field MS_CREATE_DATA-ASPECT. Data for ALV is in internal table <lt_alv>. The logic of the enhancement:

DATA: BEGIN OF ls_zz_hlp,
        huident     TYPE /scwm/s_asp_todlv_od_avstkdlv-huident,
        zz_stack_id TYPE /scwm/s_asp_todlv_od_avstkdlv-zz_stack_id,
      END OF ls_zz_hlp.
DATA: lt_zz_hlp LIKE TABLE OF ls_zz_hlp.
DATA: lt_zz_huhdr LIKE TABLE OF ls_zz_hlp.

IF ms_create_data-aspect = '/SCWM/S_ASP_TODLV_OD_AVSTKDLV'.

  MOVE-CORRESPONDING: <lt_alv> TO lt_zz_hlp.
  IF lt_zz_hlp IS NOT INITIAL.
    SELECT huident zz_stack_id
      INTO TABLE lt_zz_huhdr
      FROM /scwm/huhdr
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN lt_zz_hlp
      WHERE huident = lt_zz_hlp-huident.
  ENDIF.

  LOOP AT <lt_alv> ASSIGNING <ls_alv>.
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING <ls_alv> TO ls_zz_hlp.
    READ TABLE lt_zz_huhdr ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_zz_huhdr>) WITH KEY huident = ls_zz_hlp-huident.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <ls_zz_huhdr> TO <ls_alv>.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.

Aa the result, we have a new column filled with data:

This solution will work with other list like Other Stock etc.

entry.title: Re: Error : Expression "DP1c.D029" cannot be found in the...
entry.content:
what "things" have you tried ?
--> check whether there is a variable in WebI that cannot be resolved because the source-data-field/name is not there

entry.title: Re: EMMA / BPEM : automatic cases creation
entry.content:
As I said: your coding, where the exception is written, must be using the same Business Process Code as the EL18 transaction. 

I did send you a coding example, it is based on our EMMAX product, won't work with copy and paste, but it will give you an idea of how to write the wrapper for the exception.

Hope this helps, otherwise, please let me know and I will get you in touch with our developer.
